title: Email Connector & CRM
summary: Connect the inbox directly (alternative to forwarding), wire up CRM sync for deals & contacts, and save credentials for protected document links.
overview:
Two connectors round out ingestion:

1. **Inbox connector** — an alternative to forwarding. Authorize BuildVision to read the bid-desk inbox; new bids land automatically. Use this *or* forwarding, not both.
2. **CRM integration** — so deals and contacts flow between the client's CRM and BuildVision.

Also set up **saved credentials** so BuildVision can retrieve documents behind protected links (SharePoint, Google Drive, OneDrive) without manual download/re-upload.
prerequisites: CRM system name and auth path captured during intake
tips: Connecting the inbox and forwarding are interchangeable paths — choose one per client.
Saved credentials are **per user**, not per org — each rep who receives protected links adds their own under User Settings → Saved Credentials.
One credential per platform covers all links of that type the account can access.
warnings: CRM auth must complete with no permission errors before you test a sync.
Never store credentials that don't belong to the client's own account.
commonMistakes: Setting up both forwarding and the inbox connector, causing duplicate ingestion.
CRM connected but sync never validated with a real test record.
Expecting protected links to resolve without any saved credential on file.

steps.title: Connect the inbox (if not forwarding)
steps.description: Click **Connect your email** and authorize BuildVision to read bid-related emails and attachments. New bids then land automatically.
steps.verify: Authorization succeeds; a test bid lands automatically.

steps.title: Configure CRM integration
steps.description: Connect the CRM integration and authorize the deals + contacts sync.

callouts.text: The list of supported CRMs and the auth method for each is a known gap — see Process Gaps B-8.

steps.title: Verify the connection is live
steps.description: Confirm the forwarding rule is active (if used) and CRM sync is authenticated.
steps.verify: Connection status healthy; no auth or permission errors.

steps.title: Test CRM sync end-to-end (gate)
steps.description: Confirm a test deal/contact syncs from the CRM and appears correctly mapped in BuildVision.
steps.verify: Record appears correctly mapped in BuildVision.

steps.title: Set up saved credentials for protected links
steps.description: For clients whose bids link to protected SharePoint / Google Drive / OneDrive documents, add credentials under **User Settings → Saved Credentials → + Add Credential**. Choose the provider, name it, enter the client's own username/password, and Create.
steps.verify: A protected test link resolves and its document is retrieved automatically.

callouts.text: Credentials belong to the user account, not the org. Each person receiving protected links adds their own.

screenshots.caption: User Settings → Saved Credentials — add one credential per platform via “+ Add Credential”.
Add Credential — pick a provider (Microsoft, OneDrive, SharePoint, Google…), name it, enter the login, and Create.
